---
title: "Bioconductor Funding Hub"
---

A community-maintained record of funding relevant to the Bioconductor project — both **past
funding** that community members can learn from, and **open opportunities** worth applying to
together.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Browse:** [Past funding](funding-records/funding-records.qmd) · [Open opportunities](funding-opportunities/funding-opportunities.qmd)
:::

## Why this exists

Knowledge about what funding worked, who led it, and what's coming up currently lives scattered
across individuals' heads and inboxes. This hub collects it in one browsable, searchable place so
that:

- Future applicants can learn from successful past applications (scope, budget, team structure).
- Community members can discover open calls and find collaborators before a deadline.
- The history of how Bioconductor-related work has been funded is preserved.

## How to contribute

Entries are added via GitHub pull request by copying a template, filling in a few fields, and
opening a PR — automated checks catch missing/malformed fields before a maintainer even looks. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Bioconductor/funding-hub/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for the
full guide, or [About](about.qmd) for more on how the project is run.
